v6.0.14 - All rights reserved.

DWF Labs is a venture capital and proprietary trading firm involved in liquidity provision, investment, and derivatives trading. DWF Labs does not accept investments from external parties and does not provide service to retail customers.

In addition, please note that DWF Labs does not offer services for managing or safeguarding cryptocurrency assets or traditional currencies on behalf of third parties, investors, or customers. It is not authorized, exempted, or regulated by any regulatory authority. Any counterparty trading with DWF Labs would not benefit from the protections of various regulated entity schemes.

The material on this site is for informational purposes only and does not constitute an offer or solicitation for purchasing any cryptocurrency assets, securities or derivatives. It is not intended for access or distribution in jurisdictions where it violates local laws or regulations, in particular and not limited to counterparties that is a U.S. Person. Users accessing this site must comply with all applicable laws.

Prior to participating in any cryptocurrency, derivative, or investment activities, it is strongly advised to exercise caution and consult with independent advisors. DWF Labs disclaims liability for any losses or damages resulting from reliance on the provided information or interactions with DWF Labs.

Stay safe!

Please be informed that www.dwf-labs.com is the only official website of DWF Labs. Any other websites claiming to represent DWF Labs might not authorized and could be considered fraudulent.

To ensure the authenticity of our members and contacts, we have established a dedicated verification tool. The only official tool to verify whether a contact is an official member of DWF Labs is through our verification page: https://verify.dwf-labs.com. We strongly encourage you to utilize this tool for verification purposes.

Please exercise caution when dealing with individuals or entities claiming to represent DWF Labs through unauthorized websites or unverified communication channels. They are not official representatives of DWF Labs, and any interactions with such impostors are done at your own risk.

For any questions or concerns, please contact our official support team through the contact information provided on www.dwf-labs.com.
